ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Total budget allocated for the project */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client for the project */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the project (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the project to which the task belongs */,
  "task_name" TEXT /* Name of the task */,
  "es" INTEGER /* Early Start time for the task */,
  "ef" INTEGER /* Early Finish time for the task */,
  "ls" INTEGER /* Late Start time for the task */,
  "lf" INTEGER /* Late Finish time for the task */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the task in hours */,
  "phase" TEXT /* Phase of the project (e.g., specification, design, coding, testing) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the task (e.g., not started, in progress, completed) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the task (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "estimated_hours" INTEGER /* Estimated hours required to complete the task */,
  "actual_hours" INTEGER /* Actual hours spent on the task */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the task */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource (team member) */,
  "resource_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource (team member) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the resource (e.g., developer, designer) */,
  "availability" TEXT /* Availability status of the resource (e.g., available, busy) */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Areas of expertise of the resource */,
  "availability_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the resource becomes available */,
  "availability_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the resource is no longer available */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task to which the resource is assigned */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource assigned to the task */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date when the resource was assigned */,
  "estimated_completion_date" TEXT /* Estimated completion date for the task */,
  "actual_completion_date" TEXT /* Actual completion date for the task */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Any comments or notes related to the assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_assignments_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_assignments_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status update */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project for which the status is updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project at the given time */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of the status update */,
  "percentage_complete" TEXT /* Percentage of the project completed */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Any comments or notes related to the status update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_status_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task to which the comment is associated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "visibility" TEXT /* Visibility of the comment (e.g., public, private) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, project manager) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the notification is sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was created */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicator to show if the notification has been read */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the notification (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task that has dependencies */,
  "dependent_task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task that is dependent on another task */,
  "dependency_type" TEXT /* Type of dependency (e.g., finish-to-start, start-to-start) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_dependencies_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_dependencies_dependent_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependent_task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)
